changelog: Clean V0.7.6.2 release package based on the tested V0.7.6.0 core flow.
Fix Linux compatible ZIP paths; archive entries use forward slashes.
Fix Ubuntu 16.04 Python 3.5 compatibility by removing import secrets from install and CLI password generation.
Write the official ZXY_UPDATE_MANIFEST_URL during installation while preserving existing .env values.
Use numeric version comparison in the upgrade center and block downgrade commands.
